series_metadata.series_description: Documents court cases handled by or on behalf of the Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO) and/or its client agencies originating from lawsuits or appeals of administrative hearing rulings. Sometimes case files are originated as appeals of administrative hearing rulings by client agencies. Records include, but are not limited to, pleadings, memorandum, affidavits, attorney work product, legal research, motions, judgments, discovery, evidence, transcripts, correspondence, settlement and negotiation documents, and hearing and deposition materials, all gathered in connection with the litigation.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: from date of final appealable order or case dismissal. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately. ; Electronic: from date of final appealable order or case dismissal
